qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in relevant fields like Medicine, Orthopedics, Radiology, Dermatology, Psychiatry, Cardiology, Neurology, Nephrology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology, Pulmonology.
qualification.details: Medicine: Post Graduate Degree in Medicine, Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree Orthopedics: Post Graduate Degree in Orthopedics, Minimum 02 years of relevant experience post PG Degree Sonology/Radiology: Post Graduate Degree/ Diploma in Radiodiagnosis/Radiology, Minimum 03 years of relevant experience post PG Diploma Dermatology: DVDL/MD/DNB Dermatology Psychiatry: Post Graduate Degree in Psychiatry Cardiology: DM/SS DNB Cardiology Neurology: DM/SS DNB Neurology, N.A experience Nephrology: DM/SS DNB Nephrology Gastroenterology: DM/SS DNB Gastroenterology Endocrinology: DM/SS DNB Endocrinology Pulmonology: DM/SS DNB Pulmonology

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 5700/- to Rs. 6500/- per visit of 2 hours.
salary_details.details: Sonology/Radiology: Rs. 5700/- per visit of 2 hours Gastroenterology: Rs. 6500/- per visit of 2 hours

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for IOCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Visiting Specialist/Superspecialist Doctors positions at Indian Oil Corporation is scheduled for 23 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Visiting Specialist/Superspecialist Doctors posts?
faq.answer: Eligibility includes a Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in relevant medical fields such as Medicine, Orthopedics, Radiology, Dermatology, Psychiatry, Cardiology, Neurology, Nephrology, Gastroenterology, Endocrinology, and Pulmonology, along with specific experience requirements for certain posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 5700/- to Rs. 6500/- per visit, with each visit lasting 2 hours. Specific amounts vary for different specializations like Sonology/Radiology and Gastroenterology.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IOCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Interested candidates need to appear at the designated venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q5. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their resume, two passport-size photographs, original certificates for qualification and experience, and one set of self-attested photocopies of all these documents.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Indian Oil Corporation Limited, Barauni Refinery, Begusarai, Bihar, Pincode: 851117.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific age limits mentioned for the candidates?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify an age limit for these positions. It is advisable to check the official notification for any age-related criteria.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Visiting Specialist/Superspecialist Doctors posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications, experience, and performance during the interview.
